rulings.Case Title: MINH NGUYEN and THUY NGUYEN VS. ALEJANDRIA ORTIZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Deft Alejandro Ortiz To Respond To Interrogatories
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, December 28, 2015, Line 5. PLAINTIFF MINH NGUYEN Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Deft Alejandro Ortiz To Respond To Interrogatories is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant Alejandria Ortiz shall provide responses to Form Interrogatories -Unlawful Detainer without objections within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $960. =(501/RAW)
